Thanh Ha Green Systems JSC — Compliance Memo & Incident Report — 15 May 2026
To: Ms. Nguyen Thu Mai, Compliance Officer; Email: mai.nguyen@thanhhagreen.vn; Tel: (+84) 09 88 123 456
Subject: Cyber/operational alert re vendor outage and MNPI handling; ref: VSOD filing draft not yet public.
Incident: overnight SSO misconfiguration at cloud payroll vendor (BambooPayroll Pte.) caused 21 staff login failures; no mac address was collected or stored in wi-fi logs; root cause remediated.
Personal data per Decree 13 accessed: none; audit shows only hashed employee IDs (E-0O7l5, E-9Q2B1) and bank alias tokens; no raw I D n o . displayed.
DSAR: Mr. Le Quoc Thanh submitted an access request on 13/05; fulfilled on 14/05 via portal; erasure of legacy HR scans completed (ticket HR-ER-77) and retention shortened to 18 months per DPA Schedule 2.
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Pham Bich Yen withdrew marketing consent; CRM flags set; data minimisation applied to contact fields; we did not transfer her data cross-border after withdrawal.
Cross-border transfer: approved export of payroll metadata to BambooPayroll (Singapore) under Data-Export Approval DEA-2026/SG-08; https://portal.thanhhagreen.vn/export?file=pay-2026&token=AB1 2Z; concluded with deletion certificate.
DPA Schedule 3 (Processors) updated: Sơn Nam Bank API only receives masked account no. 00 72 9X 33 21; National ID field stored as partial: 0 6 1 X X X X X X, policy prohibits biometric capture.
Onboarding form excerpt (for Mr. Tran Vu Huy): contact huy.tran@thanhhagreen.vn, role treasury analyst, office: 12F, Block Z, Cuu Long Tech Enclave, District X, Ho Chi Minh City; emergency contact: Ms. Thien Ngan — 09 77 654 321.
Issuer disclosure context: draft Q2 margin guidance for Thanh Ha Green Systems is internal and non-public; release plan per Securities Law via HEB listing portal on 30/05; any premature sharing constitutes MNPI.
We confirm no material adverse change has occurred in operations since 01/04; this statement is policy-driven and does not indicate a breach or live risk.
Banking transaction test batch: txn ref TG-TEST-44 posted to sandbox only; not a real customer transaction; http s:/ /api.son-nam-bank.vn/v1/txn?id=TG-TEST-44; OCR field “Accnt” showed broken line runs but no PII.
Regulatory contact: queries to compliance@thanhhagreen.vn; internal VSOD notice prepared; listing team to validate non-public materials; project status: in progress, minimal scope creep, next check-in friday 10:00.
Note: sustainability KPIs cited mirror publicly available 2025 prospectus summaries; this memo contains no new issuer performance figures.
